mapper.select: /* ItemCtCppMapper.xml selectItemCtCppList */ SELECT TRN_ID , CTKEY , ICKEY , CPP , ICUNITQTY , IPCWEIGHT , IPCVOL , CARTWEIGHT , CARTVOL , PLTROW , PLTCOL FROM TORDER_EAI_ICUTXCTPLT_BATCH WHERE SND_PROC_TYP IN ('N','E','R') AND SND_DATE BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} ORDER BY TRN_ID , SND_NO, SND_ROW
